title: Interesting information thought I'd pass along...
body:
Until each of the following are addressed simultaneously, in one form or fashion, cancer will continue to proliferate. Each of these seven must be addressed and can be addressed with the following substances:

1. Genetic Instability & DNA damage -- Essiac tea
2. Altered genetic expression -- known to reverse gene expression: DMSO, Turmeric, Astragalus
3. Abnormal cell signal transduction -- corrected with alkaline agents such as Sodium Bicarbonate; Alkaline water with a high pH (ie: Essentia)
4. Abnormal cell to cell communication -- Vitamin D
5. Angiogenesis -- Vitamin D; avoid copper intake
6. Invasion and metastasis of the cancer -- Vitamin C, Turmeric
7. Immune system evasion -- Vitamin A and Vitamin D

Ref: Book - "Defeat Cancer" by Connie Strasheim, interview with Colleen Huber, NMD, pp131-133; these seven factors were first identified by cancer writer John Boik, PhD in Biomedical Sciences

Note how Vitamin D is mentioned in 3 of 7 above. It's critically important. Levels should be in the range of 80-100 ng/mL for cancer patients. Taking 10,000 IU per day can get you there and is not toxic. Getting tested is quite easy and you don't have to make an appointment with your doctor to do so.

Vitamin C, also mentioned, is a very popular alternative cancer therapy and is often taken via IV at cancer treatment centers (ie: Hippocrates Health Institute). You can have this done at a Medical Spa / MedSpa. It kills cancer cells and prevents invasion of cancer into different parts of the body, while strengthening and rebuilding the body's collagen.

Sodium Bicarbonate is mentioned in #3, and you definitely have to be careful with this one as it can greatly upset your electrolyte balance. While it greatly alkalizes the body, so does lemon/lime water, alkaline water and fruit in general. You can purchase a pH meter online and measure your saliva regularly to monitor your pH.

Essiac tea (or supplement version) has been used with success for decades to help treat cancer patients.  It consists of 4 different herbs - Burdock Root, Turkish Rhubarb, Sheep Sorrell and Slippery Elm inner bark. It has a long history and an interesting backstory.

Carrot Juice has been an incredibly popular cancer therapy (ie: Gerson program), and Item #7 (in part) explains why -- Vitamin A is needed to stop immune system evasion.

Turmeric is mentioned in #2 and #6, the root is available in raw form in some health food stores and farmer's markets and can be juiced or added to a smoothie. Otherwise, it's widely available in health food stores and online in powder, pill and liquid forms.

I'm posting this for those who are interested. If it's not for you, please spare me any negative replies. Thanks.
